boss.victory_condition: Overload the Sovereign's energy core using all collected power sources

normalized.objective: Navigate the Astral Void and stabilize the collapsing star core before reality unravels.

output.objective: Repair the cosmic stabilizer before the nebula collapses.

pickup.name: Thermal Paste
pickup.effect: Temporarily boosts damage against icy entities.

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone deactivates the security lock on the cargo hold.

pickup.name: Ion Capacitor
pickup.effect: Charges the Plasma Spanner for a massive EMP burst.

encounters.trigger: Clearing the Frost Wisp powers the gravitational lift to the bridge.

pickup.name: Stabilizer Key
pickup.effect: Required to unlock the core controls for the boss fight.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentry allows the player to enter the main stabilizer room.

boss.name: Nebula Core Guardian
boss.victory_condition: Repair the core while surviving the guardian's energy pulses.

output.setting: A crumbling starship floating within a volatile nebula.

normalized.setting: A crumbling starship floating within a volatile nebula.
